center.name: 弗里德里希·博伊厄
center.summary: 弗里德里希·博伊厄是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括角蜂鸟、Crested black tyrant，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crested black tyrant (Knipolegus lophotes) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The horned sungem (Heliactin bilophus) is a species of hummingbird native to much of central Brazil and parts of Bolivia and Suriname
